title: cenchrus ciliaris f. intermedius
intro: Cenchrus ciliaris f. intermedius, commonly known as a type of buffelgrass, is a perennial grass native to tropical and subtropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cenchrus ciliaris f. intermedius include wound healing, reducing fever, and relieving gastrointestinal issues, among others. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support overall well-being and address specific health concerns.
